title: Deep Check Integration (PA-API live data, 1-hr cache, 10/min rate)
description: Implement the Deep Check flow in lib/deepcheck/. Triggered only by explicit user action (button in Scout Result panel or Options page). Calls PA-API 5.0 GetItems endpoint (P2.6 OAuth) to fetch live price, availability, and review summary. Responses cached for 1 hour to reduce API calls (per Amazon TOS). Rate limit: 10 requests/min enforced. Results merged with local True Value score for enhanced 'Deep Check Score'. Only external API call in MVP — must be behind the Deep Check toggle (disabled by default). TDD for API response parsing, cache logic, and rate limiting.
